nodes.label: AI as idea generator for content creation
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of generic, robotic output
nodes.grounding_span: It's a good way to generate ideas that I hadn't thought of, though I find the captions to be pretty generic

nodes.label: AI as structural foundation for writing
nodes.label_negative: AI as lacking personal details and sounding robotic
nodes.grounding_span: AI has a good format and layout but lacks the personal details and it sounds pretty robotic

nodes.label: AI as emotional buffer for difficult communications
nodes.label_negative: AI as unable to capture nuanced tone
nodes.grounding_span: knowing that it was an AI that initially wrote the words made it easier for me to send the bad news

nodes.label: AI reliability in organizational tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't fully trust AI with most organizational tasks because I'm worried it will miss something important

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner requiring step-by-step verification
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to collaborate throughout a task, that way I can ensure everything is accurate at each step

nodes.label: AI as tool for skill adaptation and growth
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to human skills
nodes.grounding_span: adapting my skills to incorporate AI and make me better and more efficient at my job

nodes.label: Authentic human connection and storytelling
nodes.grounding_span: there will always be a need for human influence like through authentic interactions and storytelling

nodes.label: Professional reputation and accountability
nodes.grounding_span: it would reflect poorly on me or the business I'm representing

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: AI saved me a lot of time

nodes.label: Emotional ease in difficult tasks
nodes.grounding_span: saving me a lot of anxiety about crafting a helpful email

nodes.label: Frustration with AI not listening to feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I kept telling it that, but it still kept suggesting holidays that weren't helpful

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI-generated email tone
nodes.grounding_span: it generated a very helpful email in exactly the tone I was looking for

nodes.label: Excitement about AI's future potential
nodes.grounding_span: I'm excited at how AI can improve things in the future

nodes.label: Distrust of AI for organizational tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't fully trust AI with most organizational tasks

nodes.label: Iterative feedback refinement — provides feedback and adjusts based on AI output
nodes.grounding_span: Depending on what it sends me I give it feedback (need more business posts, need a humorous post, etc)

nodes.label: Task-dependent delegation — collaborates step-by-step for some tasks, delegates fully for others
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to collaborate throughout a task... The exception to that is usually writing profiles or news stories
